HomePage.title: Fléchettas
HomePage.subtitle: A fast, local-first match desk for X01, Cricket, training, and party darts.
HomePage.description: Start a fresh match in seconds, resume the game saved in this browser, or keep the history route ready for completed matches.
HomePage.quickStartTitle: Step up, pick a mode, and keep the table moving.
HomePage.newGameDescription: Choose players, DartBots, mode settings, legs, and sets before the first throw.
HomePage.viewHistoryDescription: This button already points to the localized match archive planned next.
HomePage.spotlightX01: Classic 301, 501, or 701 with double-in and double-out options.
HomePage.spotlightCricket: Close the big targets, pressure opponents, and track points clearly.
HomePage.spotlightCheckout: Practice finishes from 121 with focused success and failure steps.
HomePage.activeGameDescription: A saved {mode} match is ready on this device.
HomePage.abandonDialogDescription: This clears the local active match without saving it to history.
HomePage.activeLoadFailed: The active game could not be loaded.
HomePage.activeActionFailed: The active game action failed. Try again.

Scoring.inputTitle: Enter every dart without losing the rhythm.
Scoring.inputDescription: Pick a segment and multiplier, or switch to total entry for a complete X01 visit.
Scoring.turnTotalHint: Accepted range: 0 to 180. X01 totals are applied as a full visit.
Scoring.turnTotalX01Only: Turn-total scoring is currently enabled only for X01 games.
Scoring.turnTotalNeedsEmptyTurn: Finish or undo the current dart-by-dart turn before submitting a total.
Scoring.turnTotalRange: Enter a whole number from 0 to 180.
Scoring.checkoutX01Only: Checkout routes appear during an active X01 leg.
Scoring.noCheckout: No standard checkout route is available from this score.
Scoring.noActiveGame: No active game is loaded yet.

Game.emptySummary: Resume a saved game or start a new match from setup.
Game.leaveDescription: The current game is already saved locally. You can return later from the active match flow.
Game.emptyStateTitle: Start a match before opening the scorer.
Game.emptyStateDescription: There is no saved active game in this browser. Create a localized game setup, then the scorer will reopen here automatically.
Game.botControlsLocked: DartBot is throwing. Human scoring is paused for this visit.
Game.noTurnLoaded: No active turn is loaded yet.
Game.botThinking: DartBot is lining up the visit.
Game.botPauseHint: The bot waits briefly before releasing the first dart.
Game.matchCompleteDescription: Review the match summary, then save the result and either play the same setup again or return home.
Game.matchSaveFailed: The completed game could not be saved. Try the action again.

History.pageSubtitle: Review completed games saved in this browser, open the details, replay the same setup, or clear old records.
History.loadFailed: The history could not be loaded.
History.loadDetailFailed: The game detail could not be loaded.
History.emptyTitle: Your match archive is still empty.
History.emptyDescription: Finish a game from the scorer and it will appear here automatically for review, replay, or deletion.
History.missingTitle: This history entry is not available.
History.missingDescription: It may have been deleted from this browser. Return to the archive to choose another game.
History.detailSubtitle: A complete local summary of the saved configuration, player stats, and event log.
History.durationMinutes: {minutes, plural, =0 {No duration} one {# min} other {# min}}
History.deleteDialogDescription: This removes the saved {mode} match from local history on this device.
History.deleteFailed: The history entry could not be deleted.
History.replayFailed: The replay game could not be started.
History.configSummaryDescription: The saved setup used for this completed game.
History.matchSummaryDescription: Timing and local event totals for the game.
History.playerStatsDescription: Core scoring metrics and visit distribution.
History.eventSummaryDescription: A compact view of recorded game events and the latest log entries.
History.noEvents: No events were recorded for this game.

Setup.pageTitle: Set the oche before the first dart lands.
Setup.pageSubtitle: Selected mode: {mode}. Tune players, bots, and match settings before starting the local game.
Setup.modeSelectionDescription: Each card prepares a typed config for the existing engine without adding gameplay rules in the UI.

modeDescriptions.x01: The classic 301, 501, or 701 flow with double options.
modeDescriptions.cricket: Close 20 through 15 and bull with scoring variants.
modeDescriptions.around-the-clock: Walk the board in order with open or required multipliers.
modeDescriptions.bobs-27: Start on 27 points and chase doubles round by round.
modeDescriptions.checkout-121: Practice finishes from 121 with success and failure steps.
modeDescriptions.shanghai: Stack rounds while keeping instant Shanghai available.
modeDescriptions.training: Focused practice for singles, doubles, scoring, cricket, or checkout.
modeDescriptions.killer: Assign numbers and manage lives in an elimination mode.

Setup.playerStepDescription: Add up to {count} human players. DartBots can fill out the match without counting against that limit.
Setup.botLimitHint: Bots do not count against the human limit
Setup.emptyPlayers: Add at least one player or DartBot to start the game.
Setup.configStepTitle: Tune the match without touching engine rules
Setup.configStepDescription: These options build the {mode} config that will be passed to the store.
Setup.modeConfigDescription: Defaults are playable and can be refined before the start.
Setup.reviewStepDescription: The game will be created locally, then the app will navigate to the planned game screen.
Setup.reviewPlayersDescription: {count, plural, one {# participant configured} other {# participants configured}}

errors.atLeastOne: Add at least one player or DartBot before starting.
errors.uniqueNames: Every participant name must be unique.
errors.humanLimit: You can add {count} human players at most.
errors.startFailed: The game could not be created right now. Check the settings and try again.

Pwa.installDescription: Keep the local match desk one tap away, even when the Wi-Fi at the oche gets shaky.
Pwa.offlineDescription: Saved matches and cached pages stay available locally. New network content will return when the connection does.
Pwa.updateDescription: A newer local scorer is waiting. Refresh now to switch safely after the current screen is saved.
